nodes.name: Kofiau monarch
nodes.summary: The Kofiau monarch (Symposiachrus julianae) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Kofiau in Indonesia. Taxonomy and systematics This species was originally classified in the genus Monarcha until moved to Symposiachrus in 2009. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Kofiau monarch (Symposiachrus julianae) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Kofiau in Indonesia.

nodes.name: Kofiau monarch

nodes.name: Symposiachrus
nodes.summary: Symposiachrus（Symposiachrus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联23种鸟类，如Black monarch、Rufous monarch、Flores monarch等23种鸟类。
